items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at a pace of 6:00-6:30 min/km. Aim to keep your heart rate in Zone 2 (130-150 bpm).

items.title: Speed Work
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, perform 5x800m intervals at a pace of 5:00 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Easy Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at an easy pace of 7:30-8:00 min/km. Keep your heart rate below 140 bpm to aid recovery.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Focus on full-body strength training with 3 sets of 10-12 reps for exercises like squats, lunges, and deadlifts. Include core work with planks and Russian twists.
